title: Echani light armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Echani_light_armor.jpg|thumb|[[Atton Rand]] wearing Echani light armor]]

'''Echani light armor''' was an example of the [[Echani/Legends|Echani]] preference for elegant design over brute force. The [[Maktite]]s learned this when their thermal weapons failed due to a minor change in the Echani armor.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-07-XX -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
